name: bifu
description: BifuFX trading — read balances/positions/orders and place or cancel spot & contract orders via the bifu-cli MCP server.
long_description: Exposes the BifuFX trading platform to Claude Desktop through the bifu-cli MCP server: spot, contract, forex (MT5/TradFi), payments, WebSocket and orion signals. Pick the environment (dev / staging / prod) at install time.

profile.title: Environment
profile.description: Which bifu-cli profile to trade on: dev (test funds), staging, or prod (real money). Create and log in first: bifu-cli config init --profile <env> --env <env> && bifu-cli --profile <env> auth login
